title: Rename device - dialog
scenario: Rename device dialog does not match Figma design when accessed from Device Settings > General on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
3. Tap on the connected device name to enter Device Settings.
4. In Device Settings, tap on General.
5. Locate the device's official name displayed on the General screen.
6. Tap on the device's official name.
expected: A dialog appears with: a text field pre-filled with the current device name, a Cancel button, a Done button, and the keyboard automatically shown below the dialog. The dialog's visual design matches the Figma mockup.
